title: onopordum illyricum var. delortii
intro: Onopordum illyricum var. delortii, also known as the Illlyrian cottonthistle, is a variety of thistle plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall, thistle-like flowers and prickly foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Onopordum illyricum var. delortii are said to include relief from digestive issues and improved immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and then infusing them in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
